steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select '0825.184301 display acquirer' acquirer using filter
Click 'Edit acquirer MID' button to edit acquirer
Verify: Acquirer display name matches expected
Verify: Acquirer code is 'NGenius' by default
